name: studio-yonetim-asistani
description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for boutique fitness studios. Phase 1 scaffold.

scripts.emulators: pnpm build:functions && PATH="$(/usr/libexec/java_home 2>/dev/null || brew --prefix openjdk 2>/dev/null)/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:start --import=.seed --export-on-exit
scripts.test:integration: PATH="$(/usr/libexec/java_home 2>/dev/null || brew --prefix openjdk 2>/dev/null)/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --project demo-sos 'vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts'
scripts.monkey: PATH="$(/usr/libexec/java_home 2>/dev/null || brew --prefix openjdk 2>/dev/null)/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --project demo-sos --only firestore 'tsx tools/monkey-alpha.ts'
scripts.stress: PATH="$(/usr/libexec/java_home 2>/dev/null || brew --prefix openjdk 2>/dev/null)/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --project demo-sos --only firestore 'tsx tools/stress-alpha.ts'
scripts.verify:alpha: PATH="$(/usr/libexec/java_home 2>/dev/null || brew --prefix openjdk 2>/dev/null)/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --project demo-sos --only firestore 'tsx tools/verify-alpha-e2e.ts'
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm typecheck:tools
scripts.check: pnpm check:lockfile && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm build:functions && pnpm test:unit
